news.headline: Jeffs’ Brands is getting closer to launching Fort's AI-driven pest control app with Apple App Store submission.

news.summary: Taylor Guitars has introduced a revolutionary neck design that offers unparalleled precision in adjusting string height with micro-accuracy. This innovation represents a significant milestone in the company's 50-year commitment to creating playable and serviceable guitars. The new design, patented by Taylor, is a game-changer and is set to enhance the playing experience for musicians. The announcement was made in El Cajon, California, on April 8, 2025. This development solidifies Taylor Guitars' position as a frontrunner in the industry, demonstrating their ongoing dedication to innovation and quality craftsmanship.
news.headline: Taylor Guitars introduces revolutionary Action Control Neck™ for precise string height adjustment, marking 50 years of innovation.

news.summary: Featuring waterproof work boots, hard-wearing insulated gloves, and durable bib overalls and work jackets designed to withstand harsh weather conditions, the latest FrostFlex™ System will be exhibited at Booth #534. The event will take place in GRAND RAPIDS, Mich., on April 8, 2025. RefrigiWear, the leading global provider in this industry, will showcase their cutting-edge products at the event.
news.headline: RefrigiWear to showcase insulated PPE at APWA Snow Conference in Grand Rapids, featuring FrostFlex System. Booth #534.

news.summary: The National Association of State Boating Law Administrators (NASBLA), established in 1960, has evolved from a modest assembly of state representatives to a prominent figure in promoting recreational boating safety. In its 65-year history, NASBLA has broadened its scope to encompass law enforcement efforts.
news.headline: NASBLA marks 65 years advancing boating safety since 1960, developing into a key entity with a widespread impact.

news.summary: American Cruise Lines has unveiled a series of Extended Cruises consisting of 50 days or more to commemorate the United States' 250th Birthday in 2026. These unparalleled U.S. River cruises will be the longest available on the market. In the upcoming year, American Cruise Lines will introduce a remarkable 52-Day Great River cruise experience.
news.headline: American Cruise Lines introduces 50-Day+ U.S. River Cruises to celebrate 250th Birthday of USA, longest in the market.

news.summary: Rare Cannabinoid Company is starting the 420 season with exclusive deals on their nano THC + CBC Mood Mints and CBDV Oil Tinctures. Customers can also get a complimentary pack of THCV Gummies on orders exceeding $75. The promotion is in effect from April 8, 2025, in Honolulu.
news.headline: Rare Cannabinoid Company offers 420 deals on THC Mood Mints, CBDV Oil with free THCV Gummies for orders over $75.

news.summary: New author Surina Carloni's debut book "Yoga Moon Dance" published by AuthorHouse tells a story of resilience, second chances, and hope. Released on April 9, 2025, in Calgary, AB, this book invites readers into a poignant and humorous journey.
news.headline: Debut author Surina Carloni releases "Yoga Moon Dance", a tale of resilience and second chances.

news.summary: Renowned artist Rod Engel skillfully intertwines art, personal challenges, and poetic narration in a poignant narrative of self-realization. On April 9, 2025, in San Diego, Engel mesmerizes audiences with his seamless fusion of truth and fantasy in "Scarlet, Circles, and Dreams." This compelling masterpiece delves deep into his creative evolution, captivating readers with a tale that reflects his struggle and growth. Embracing vulnerability and artistic prowess, Engel's work stands as a testament to the power of storytelling.
news.headline: Artist Rod Engel's book 'Scarlet, Circles, and Dreams' captures his quest for purpose in a moving tale of self-discovery. SAN DIEGO, April 9, 2025.

news.summary: TFSF Ventures, a software development firm based in Dubai, has announced the launch of a spring discount campaign on April 9, 2025. The campaign aims to promote their advanced solutions in cryptocurrency, artificial intelligence, and payment gateways for businesses worldwide. With a focus on innovation, TFSF Ventures is offering discounts to attract potential clients. This Dubai-based company is recognized for its expertise in developing cutting-edge technologies.
news.headline: Dubai-based TFSF Ventures introduces advanced fintech and crypto solutions, offering spring discounts and highlighting innovations for global businesses.

news.summary: In recent news out of Sacramento, California on April 9, 2025, it has been reported that a breakthrough has been made in the automotive industry regarding the long-standing issue of reverse noise caused by wiper blades. Despite decades of struggles from automakers and wiper brands in addressing this problem, KIMBLADE X has introduced a solution with its innovative multi-joint rectangular design. This groundbreaking product aims to finally put an end to the annoyance experienced by drivers, representing a significant advancement in the sector.
news.headline: KIMBLADE X windshield wipers eliminate annoying noise with unique design. Major breakthrough after decades of struggle.

news.summary: Join us on Saturday, September 20, 2025 in ORANGE COUNTY, Calif., for the Pacific Wine & Food Classic. This culinary event will showcase the diverse flavors of Southern California with a variety of bold bites from top chefs in the region. Don't miss out on this epicurean playground where guests can immerse themselves in SoCal's culinary soul.
news.headline: Pacific Wine & Food Classic returns to Newport Dunes Waterfront Resort on September 20, 2025, showcasing SoCal's culinary delights.

news.summary: Cartken Hauler has revolutionized industrial automation with its exceptional mobility across all terrains, impressive payload capacity, and rapid deployment capabilities. Based in Oakland, California, the company revealed its latest advancements on April 9, 2025. As a frontrunner in autonomous robotics, Cartken showcases unmatched efficiency and flexibility, setting new standards in the industry.
news.headline: Cartken introduces Cartken Hauler, an autonomous robot for enhanced material handling with high payload capacity.

news.summary: A company named Soul Song provides a unique service where astrological birth chart information is transformed into custom musical portraits. The process involves human artists utilizing AI technology to analyze planetary positions and recommend musical components. This service maintains a focus on the human artist, with AI assisting in creating personalized musical pieces.
news.headline: Soul Song uses AI to turn birth chart data into personalized music; human artists craft it. AI suggests elements.

news.summary: Blackwire Labs, a company based in Ponte Vedra, Florida, revealed on April 9, 2025, the introduction of tailored cybersecurity solutions for various sectors like healthcare, government, defense, and nonprofits. This initiative aims to provide specialized AI-driven cybersecurity solutions to these industries.
news.headline: Blackwire Labs launches industry-specific advisory solutions for healthcare, government, defense, and nonprofits in cybersecurity.

news.summary: ZURU Group, a New Zealand-based global toy and consumer goods company, received recognition from Walmart for their outstanding partnership, marking a significant achievement in their success story. The acknowledgment underscores the strong collaboration between the two entities, with ZURU Group's products now reaching a global audience. The announcement was made on April 9, 2025, in Auckland, New Zealand. This partnership has proven to be a lucrative venture, demonstrating the impact of their collaboration on a massive scale.
news.headline: ZURU Group from New Zealand wins 2 Supplier of the Year awards at Walmart Supplier Growth Forum.🏆🎉 Global success story.

news.summary: Goldco has achieved the 18th position on the 2025 Inc. Regionals: Pacific list, this being the third year in a row. The recognition signifies significant expansion, employment generation, and dedication to safeguarding Americans' retirement funds. The announcement was made in Los Angeles on April 9, 2025 via PRNewswire-PRWeb. This acknowledgment from Inc. magazine highlights the company's consistent performance and contribution to the financial well-being of individuals.
news.headline: Goldco ranked #18 on 2025 Inc. Regionals Pacific list for third year, showcasing growth, job creation, and retirement savings commitment.

news.summary: A company known for its scientifically supported supplements, MD Logic Health®, has teamed up with functional health specialist Noelle Tarr, CEO & Founder of Well Minerals, to introduce Pure Creatine. This new product is a pure creatine monohydrate formulation aimed at enhancing physical performance and cognitive function.
news.headline: MD Logic Health® and Well Minerals collaborate on Pure Creatine, a clean, high-absorption creatine monohydrate for physical and cognitive performance.

news.summary: The market is urging a top industry player to enhance the safety and utility of working with AI Agents. In Tel Aviv-Yafo, Israel, on April 9, 2025, Zenity, a prominent figure in AI Agent security, introduced the Zenity Partner Program. This program represents the initial curated ecosystem to support [important relevant number] organizations looking to collaborate on ensuring secure interactions with AI Agents.
news.headline: Zenity launches Partner Program to secure AI Agents, meeting market demand for easier collaboration.

news.summary: KetteQ, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven Adaptive Supply Chain Planning tools, recently revealed that The Greenery, an international distributor of fresh produce based in the Netherlands, has chosen ketteQ as its primary software to integrate with Salesforce. This strategic decision marks a significant milestone for both companies as they collaborate to enhance their operations.
news.headline: The Greenery partners with ketteQ for AI-powered supply chain planning on Salesforce for fresh produce distribution.

news.summary: In Dallas, CMCT has officially paid off and closed its recourse credit facility.
news.headline: CMCT in Dallas announces full repayment and retirement of recourse credit facility.

news.summary: In New York, Rondah AI, a specialized AI platform for dental service organizations (DSOs), revealed a pre-seed funding round amounting to $1.8 million. The investment was jointly led by 2048 Ventures and Twelve Below. Rondah AI offers advanced AI agents tailored for DSOs to recover missed revenue, alleviate staffing challenges, and significantly enhance patient satisfaction. Through these solutions, Rondah AI equips DSOs with enhanced operational efficiency, with practices utilizing Rondah reporting complete elimination of missed calls and duplicated efforts.
news.headline: Rondah AI raises $1.8M to double dental appointment bookings through AI, funded by 2048 Ventures and Twelve Below.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Motif, Inc., a leading software platform for the modern built environment, has recently welcomed three industry veterans to its leadership team. Tatjana Dzambazova has been appointed as the Director of AI Solutions within the CTO Office, Jens Majdal Kaarsholm as the Director of Industry and Market Development, and Greg Demchak as the Vice President of Industry and Market Development. These strategic additions emphasize Motif's dedication to transforming the future of the industry.
news.headline: Motif adds 3 industry leaders to executive team to drive BIM innovation. New roles include Director of AI Solutions, VP of Industry, and Market development. Commitment to reshape the future of built environment.

news.summary: In Rochester, N.Y., Sutherland, a prominent global business and digital transformation firm, revealed an enhanced collaboration with Google Cloud aiming to assist clients in hastening enterprise-wide integration of Generative AI to drive prompt, quantifiable business benefits. Leveraging their years of effective teamwork, Sutherland and Google Cloud are initiating a fresh chapter in enterprise evolution centered on Agentic AI. This updated partnership combines Google Cloud’s innovative expertise in AI with Sutherland's domain knowledge.
news.headline: Sutherland partners with Google Cloud to provide AI solutions to businesses worldwide, aiming to accelerate enterprise adoption of Generative AI.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, at Google Cloud Next 2025, CrowdStrike, listed on NASDAQ as CRWD, was named the recipient of the prestigious 2025 Google Cloud Security Partner of the Year Award for Workload Security. This accolade highlights CrowdStrike's excellence in providing security solutions. Alongside this recognition, CrowdStrike disclosed its intensified collaboration with Google Cloud to offer comprehensive security for AI advancements, covering the entire process from code development to cloud deployment, through CrowdStrike Falcon® Cloud Security. This partnership enhancement ensures top-tier security for Google Cloud users.
news.headline: CrowdStrike named 2025 Google Cloud Security Partner of the Year for Workload Security; secures AI innovation. Expands partnership with Google Cloud.

news.summary: In Seattle, according to a report by Redfin, the total value of homes in majority-Hispanic neighborhoods increased by 4.2% year over year to reach $2 trillion in 2024. However, areas with a majority of Black, Asian, or white homeowners, or mixed racial demographics, experienced even faster growth in total home values. Notably, the total home value in majority-white neighborhoods had the highest growth rate at 5.4%, reaching $40.4 trillion in 2024, outpacing the growth in Hispanic neighborhoods.
news.headline: Hispanic home values surpass $2 trillion, growing by 4.2% in 2024, trailing other ethnic groups. White neighborhoods saw fastest growth to $40.4 trillion.

news.summary: Rubrik (NYSE: RBRK) based in Palo Alto, California, revealed its latest project Rubrik Annapurna, which aims to facilitate secure data access and utilization for AI applications by enterprises. This initiative will allow Rubrik users to leverage its features alongside Google Agentspace, enabling support for enterprise AI models to access, manage, and safeguard confidential data with high-security standards like Zero Trust on Google Cloud. The collaborative effort is expected to provide a seamless solution suitable for businesses looking to enhance their AI capabilities.
news.headline: Rubrik partners with Google Agentspace to enhance AI security, access, and data protection, benefitting enterprises.

news.summary: WisdomTree recently shared their monthly statistics for March 2025, which disclosed key figures such as assets under management (AUM) and flow data categorized by asset class.
news.headline: WisdomTree announced monthly metrics for March 2025, revealing assets under management (AUM) and flow data by asset class.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, Cohesity, a top AI-powered data security provider, revealed an enhanced collaboration with Google Cloud at Cloud Next ’25. The aim is to aid organizations in fighting against increasingly complex cyber threats. Recent data indicates that companies face significant financial losses, with an average of $540,000 expended per hour during downtime. This underscores the urgent requirement for strong cyber resilience measures to minimize business disruptions. The partnership will offer new solutions to assist organizations in bolstering their cybersecurity defenses and preparing for potential cyber attacks.
news.headline: Cohesity strengthens ties with Google Cloud to boost cybersecurity, with companies spending $540,000 per hour on downtime.

news.summary: In London, Okta, Inc. revealed that Auth for GenAI in Developer Preview is now accessible as part of the Auth0 Platform. This suite of features allows developers to seamlessly integrate secure identity into GenAI applications. The goal is to ensure that AI agents come equipped with essential elements like built-in authentication, precise authorization, asynchronous workflows, and secure API access. These new capabilities will empower developers to more effectively address enterprise app needs. This step marks a significant milestone for Okta, Inc. (NASDAQ: OKTA), a key player in the independent Identity sector.
news.headline: Okta introduces Auth for GenAI in Developer Preview, part of Auth0 Platform, helping developers integrate secure identity into GenAI applications, ensuring AI agents have authentication, authorization, async workflows, and secure API access.

news.summary: In London, Okta, Inc. revealed new Okta Platform features to enhance security for non-human identities like AI agents. The company, listed on NASDAQ as OKTA, aims to offer equal levels of visibility, control, governance, and automation for these entities as for human identities. The updated Okta Platform provides organizations with a comprehensive identity security framework to oversee and protect various identities within their network. This includes AI agents, API keys, employees, and more. The platform ensures streamlined management and enhanced security for all identity types.
news.headline: Okta unveils new Platform capabilities to secure non-human identities like AI agents, offering visibility and control.

news.summary: In Sunnyvale, California, Juniper Networks (NYSE: JNPR) has partnered with Google Cloud to enhance enterprise campus and branch deployments and improve user experiences. Through the Google Cloud Marketplace, customers can easily access Google’s Cloud WAN solution combined with Juniper Mist wired, wireless, NAC, firewalls, and secure SD-WAN solutions. This collaboration, revealed at Google Cloud Next 25, aims to streamline the process for customers to subscribe to these services for optimized networking solutions.
news.headline: Juniper Networks teams up with Google Cloud for enterprise branch transformation in AI era, offering integrated solutions.

news.summary: Veradigm® (OTCMKTS: MDRX), a healthcare data and technology solutions provider, was declared the top provider of payer analytics solutions for health plans by Black Book Research. This marks the second consecutive year that Veradigm has secured the highest ranking, with top marks also achieved in 2024. The company's Payer Analytics division excelled in all categories, cementing its position as the leading provider in the industry.
news.headline: Veradigm's Payer Analytics named #1 by Black Book in 2025, 2nd consecutive year; received top ranking also in 2024.

news.summary: In Westlake Village, California, Energy Vault Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: NRGV) disclosed that Dylan Hixon will join the Company's Board of Directors from March 31, 2025. Hixon is replacing Energy Vault co-founder Bill Gross, who will step down from the Board to become an Advisor. An initial investor in Energy Vault, Hixon holds the position of President at Arden Road Inv. These changes mark a significant development for the sustainable grid-scale energy storage solutions company.
news.headline: Energy Vault appoints Dylan Hixon to Board of Directors, replacing co-founder Bill Gross, effective March 31, 2025.

news.summary: Safe Pro Group Inc., a top player in AI-driven defense and security tech traded on Nasdaq as SPAI, revealed a service extension for its drone services subsidiary, Airborne Response. The company, known for its innovative technologies, will now offer upgraded drone-based critical infrastructure assessment services in addition to its regular monitoring and hurricane recovery programs. This move comes as part of an extended agreement with one of Florida's largest electric utilities, reflecting the company's commitment to boosting its offerings in the region.
news.headline: Safe Pro Group subsidiary Airborne Response, under existing contract, to provide advanced drone-based infrastructure assessments for major Florida utility. (Characters: 120)

news.summary: A biotechnology company, INOVIO, headquartered in Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania, disclosed on April 9, 2025, its focus on developing and marketing DNA medicines for combating HPV-related diseases, cancer, and infectious diseases. The company, listed on NASDAQ as INO, shared plans to showcase significant developments.
news.headline: INOVIO (NASDAQ: INO) will present at scientific conferences to showcase DNA medicines for HPV, cancer, and infectious diseases.

news.summary: A recent collaboration is strengthening financial institutions by providing better real-time fraud detection and smoother account validation processes to enhance digital origination workflows. This partnership involves Amount, a prominent player in facilitating the opening of consumer and small business deposit accounts and loans. The development aims to improve operational efficiency and security, offering institutions increased capabilities in recognizing and combating fraud in real-time. This initiative, launched in Alpharetta, Ga., on April 9, 2025, will enhance the overall customer experience by making these essential processes more seamless.
news.headline: Amount partners with ValidiFI to improve digital origination solutions with real-time fraud detection and account validation.

news.summary: Dublin-based reAlpha Tech Corp. (Nasdaq: AIRE), a real estate technology firm specializing in AI, recently completed the redemption of outstanding warrants for 4,218,751 shares of common stock. Initially issued in November 2023 with an exercise price of $1.44 per share, the warrants were exercised at a reduced price of $0.75 per share. The common stock issued following the redemption is registered under Form S-3 (No. 333-284234). The Company raised around $3.1 million from this redemption, excluding placement agent fees and offering expenses.
news.headline: reAlpha Tech Corp. closed warrant exercise, raising $3.1M with 4,218,751 shares issued at $0.75 per share.

news.summary: Sylvamo (NYSE: SLVM), the leading global paper company, is set to unveil its first-quarter earnings on May 9. The market will receive the report before the opening bell. To delve deeper into the financial updates, interested individuals can tune in to the audio webcast scheduled at 10 a.m. EDT on investors.sylvamo.com. For participation, a call can be placed at 800-715-9871 (U.S.) or +1-646-307-1963 (international) with access code 6289099. In case of missing out, replays can be accessed on the aforementioned website for up to one year, or via phone for a week, by dialing 800-770-2030 (U.S.).
news.headline: Sylvamo (NYSE: SLVM) will release 1st quarter earnings on May 9, with audio webcast at 10 a.m. EDT. Replay available for 1 year online and 1 week by phone.
Fed's Daly: We have time and space to deliberate next moves.

news.summary: In New York, IFF (NYSE: IFF) revealed the launch of the Citrus Innovation Center in Lakeland, Florida, in collaboration with Florida Polytechnic University. The new 30,000 square foot facility showcases cutting-edge botanical research, utilizing the LMR by IFF natural ingredients know-how. It specializes in processing, analytics, and product development for scent and taste, integrating a unique 360-degree digital immersion room. Prioritizing sustainability, the center provides advanced capabilities in the field.
news.headline: IFF opens Citrus Innovation Center in Florida with Florida Polytechnic University, a 30,000 sq ft facility with advanced botanical research capabilities and a 360-degree digital immersion room.

news.summary: Dine Brands Global, Inc. (NYSE: DIN), based in Pasadena, California, has unveiled its 2024 Business Responsibility Report. The company, which owns popular dining chains like Applebee's Neighborhood Grill + Bar®, Fuzzy’s Taco Shop®, and IHOP®, released this report showcasing their achievements and commitments in critical areas such as People, Planet, Food, and Governance. The collaborative efforts of employees, franchisees, and restaurants have led to significant progress, as outlined in the report.
news.headline: Dine Brands Global releases 2024 Business Responsibility Report, focusing on People, Planet, Food, Governance. Milestones highlighted.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, iQmetrix's SummitX event last year was a remarkable success, uniting the industry with a three-day event. This year, iQmetrix is elevating SummitX, known as North America’s sole provider of Interconnected Commerce solutions for telecom retail. The upcoming SummitX 2025 is set to surpass expectations, taking place in October. The event will transition from desert landscapes to coastal palm trees, boasting a new splendid venue. Last year's SummitX drew in record numbers, and this year's event aims to build on that momentum, anticipating an even larger turnout.
news.headline: iQmetrix to host SummitX 2025 in California, attracting telecom retail sector to 'reimagine everything'. Last year's event was a success.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, renowned golfer Bernhard Langer, a two-time Masters champion, recently inked a deal with Skechers. Langer will showcase Skechers' golf footwear during his upcoming appearance at Augusta. The seasoned pro from the PGA Tour Champions and European Senior Tour will bring "Comfort That Performs®" to the event, sporting the Skechers Blade with innovative Hands Free Slip-ins® technology. This collaboration sees Langer don a special edition colorway crafted to commemorate the occasion, marking a significant partnership in his extensive golf career.
news.headline: Golf legend Bernhard Langer signs with Skechers, will wear Skechers golf footwear at Augusta, bringing comfort and tech.

news.summary: Shake Shack Inc. (NYSE: SHAK) is set to announce its first quarter 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025, before the market opens. This event will be accompanied by a conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET, featuring CEO Rob Lynch and CFO Katie Fogertey. To join the call, dial (877) 407-0792 for domestic participants. International participants can also tune in for the latest updates.
news.headline: Shake Shack to reveal Q1 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025; conference call with CEO and CFO at 8:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: In Dallas, o9, a top enterprise AI software platform provider focusing on enhancing planning and decision-making processes, revealed a remarkable 60% increase in new clients during Q1 2025. The company's robust performance was evident through its expanding global customer base, successful implementations in various industries, and active participation from business executives at its international events and executive forums. Notably, o9 onboarded new clients within the manufacturing and retail fields, solidifying its growth trajectory for the year.
news.headline: o9 sees 60% YoY growth in new clients in Q1 2025; gains traction in manufacturing and retail sectors, global presence.

news.summary: Greensboro, North Carolina-based Tanger, a prominent owner and operator of outlet and open-air retail shopping destinations, revealed a 6.4% hike in its dividend on common shares, raising it from $1.10 to $1.17 per share annually. The company's Board of Directors also announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.2925 per share, slated for payment on May 15, 2025, to common shareholders recorded as of April 30, 2025. This increase is a positive step for shareholders and reflects Tanger's commitment to delivering value.
news.headline: Tanger increases dividend on common shares from $1.10 to $1.17 annually. Quarterly dividend set at $0.2925 per share.

news.summary: Venu Holding Corporation, a company listed on NYSE American as VENU, specializing in upscale live music venues and premium hospitality destinations, has recently acquired an important property in Centennial, Colorado, located in the rapidly growing Denver suburb. The acquisition signifies a significant step in VENU's expansion strategy across multiple markets. This key property will be utilized to develop their renowned mid-size indoor music venue brand, The Hall at Bourbon Brothers, alongside enhanced hospitality offerings.
news.headline: Venu Holding Corporation acquires property in Centennial, Colorado, expanding its upscale music venue brand.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Zinus has collaborated with the Think Watts Foundation to provide aid to victims of California wildfires. The initiative involves the donation of 100 Queen-Size mattresses and bed frames to those affected by the devastating fires.
news.headline: Zinus donates 100 queen-size mattresses and bed frames to California wildfire victims in partnership with Think Watts Foundation.

news.summary: In Oakland, California, the Golden State Valkyries have revealed a new multi-year collaboration with Sephora U.S. According to the agreement, Sephora has become a founding partner of the Valkyries. As a key component of this deal, Sephora will now have the naming rights to the team’s 31,800-square-foot performance center located in Oakland. This facility will be known as the “Sephora Performance Center”. Additionally, Sephora will serve as the presenting sponsor for the Valkyries Content Day and Training Camp.
news.headline: Golden State Valkyries partner with Sephora U.S., naming rights for 31,800 sq ft facility in Oakland.

news.summary: A cannabis brand, Connected Cannabis Co., based in Sacramento, California, unveiled the Queen of Diamonds Box in collaboration with Kush Queen, a renowned cannabis wellness brand. This limited-edition gift box merges Connected's high-quality flower with Kush Queen's popular self-care items like live resin bath bombs and award-winning THC lubricant. Known for their top-tier genetics and advanced cultivation techniques, Connected is offering this special product to the market.
news.headline: Connected Cannabis Co. partners with Kush Queen for limited-edition Queen of Diamonds Box in Sacramento, offering premium flower with self-care products like live resin bath bombs and THC lubricant.
